title: Snappy Jamaican Crunchy Hash
description: A flavorful breakfast dish made with crispy hash browns and a crunchy Jamaican twist.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together hash browns, jerk seasoning, and a pinch of salt.
3. Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet and roast for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
4. Meanwhile, cook the bacon in a pan until crispy.
5. Chop the green onions and set aside.
6. Once the hash browns are done, top with crispy bacon, chopped green onions, and crunchy chopped peanuts.
7. Sprinkle crushed red pepper flakes on top, if desired.
9. Garnish with additional chopped peanuts and green onions, if desired.
